name: ue-perfectworld
description: Project-neutral Codex workflows for safe Unreal Engine planning, investigation, implementation, review, and Blueprint/editor integration.

interface.shortDescription: 通用 UE 项目的规划、实现、审查、排查和蓝图协作规则。
interface.longDescription: UE PerfectWorld provides project-neutral Unreal Engine workflows that treat workspaces as read-only by default, require evidence-backed ownership and lifecycle discovery before implementation, provide complete transcription-ready code and ordered editor actions when file edits are not authorized, and enforce a blocking final self-review that fixes known bugs and rewrites avoidable overdesign before delivery.
defaultPrompt: 用 UE PerfectWorld 规划这个 Unreal Engine 功能
用 UE PerfectWorld 排查这个 UE bug 的根因
用 UE PerfectWorld 审查当前 UE 代码
